name: list_indexes
description: List all indexes in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: offset
arguments.desc: Offset for pagination (default 0, optional)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum number of indexes to return (default 20, optional)

name: get_index
description: Retrieve information about a specific index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index to retrieve

name: create_index
description: Create a new index in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index to create

arguments.name: primary_key
arguments.desc: Primary key attribute name (optional)

name: update_index
description: Update settings or primary key of an index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index to update

arguments.name: primary_key
arguments.desc: New primary key attribute name (optional)

name: delete_index
description: Delete an index and all of its documents.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index to delete

name: swap_indexes
description: Swap the contents of two or more indexes.

arguments.name: indexes
arguments.desc: List of index pairs to swap (e.g. [['indexA', 'indexB']])

name: get_documents
description: Retrieve multiple documents from the index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index

arguments.name: offset
arguments.desc: Offset for pagination (default 0, optional)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum number of documents to retrieve (default 20, optional)

arguments.name: fields
arguments.desc: List of attributes to retrieve (optional)

arguments.name: ids
arguments.desc: Retrieve only documents with specified IDs (optional)

name: get_document
description: Retrieve a single document from the index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index

arguments.name: document_id
arguments.desc: Unique ID of the document

arguments.name: fields
arguments.desc: List of attributes to retrieve (optional)

name: add_documents
description: Add or replace documents in the index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index

arguments.name: documents
arguments.desc: Array of document objects to add/update

name: delete_documents
description: Delete multiple documents by their IDs.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index

arguments.name: document_ids
arguments.desc: List of document IDs to delete

name: delete_document
description: Delete a single document by its ID.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index

arguments.name: document_id
arguments.desc: ID of the document to delete

name: search
description: Search for documents in a Meilisearch index.

arguments.name: index_name
arguments.desc: Name of the index to search in

arguments.name: q
arguments.desc: Query string (optional)

arguments.name: offset
arguments.desc: Offset for pagination (default 0, optional)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum number of search results (default 20, optional)

arguments.name: attributesToRetrieve
arguments.desc: Attributes to retrieve (optional)

arguments.name: attributesToSearchOn
arguments.desc: Attributes to search on (optional)

arguments.name: filter
arguments.desc: Meilisearch filter string (optional)

arguments.name: sort
arguments.desc: Sort criteria, e.g. ['price:asc'] (optional)

arguments.name: facets
arguments.desc: Facets to retrieve (optional)

arguments.name: showRankingScore
arguments.desc: Show ranking score (optional)

arguments.name: showRankingScoreDetails
arguments.desc: Show ranking score details (optional)

name: list_keys
description: List all API keys in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: offset
arguments.desc: Offset for pagination (default 0, optional)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum number of keys to return (default 20, optional)

name: get_key
description: Retrieve info about a specific API key.

arguments.name: key_or_uid
arguments.desc: Key string or UID of the API key

name: create_key
description: Create a new API key in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: actions
arguments.desc: List of authorized actions (e.g. ['*'] or ['search'])

arguments.name: indexes
arguments.desc: List of authorized indexes (e.g. ['*'] or ['movies'])

arguments.name: description
arguments.desc: Description for the API key (optional)

arguments.name: expires_at
arguments.desc: Expiration date in RFC3339 format, or null (optional)

name: update_key
description: Update name or description of an API key.

arguments.name: key_or_uid
arguments.desc: Key string or UID of the API key

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: New name for the key (optional)

arguments.name: description
arguments.desc: New description for the key (optional)

name: delete_key
description: Delete an API key.

arguments.name: key_or_uid
arguments.desc: Key string or UID of the key to delete

name: list_tasks
description: List Meilisearch tasks with filters and pagination.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Limit the number of tasks returned (default 20, optional)

arguments.name: from
arguments.desc: Retrieve tasks starting from a specific task ID (optional)

arguments.name: index_uids
arguments.desc: Filter tasks by index UIDs (optional)

arguments.name: statuses
arguments.desc: Filter tasks by status (e.g. enqueued, processing) (optional)

arguments.name: types
arguments.desc: Filter tasks by type (e.g. indexCreation) (optional)

name: get_task
description: Get details about a specific task.

arguments.name: task_uid
arguments.desc: The unique task ID/UID to fetch

name: cancel_tasks
description: Cancel one or more tasks based on filters.

arguments.name: statuses
arguments.desc: Cancel tasks matching statuses (e.g. enqueued, processing) (optional)

arguments.name: types
arguments.desc: Cancel tasks matching types (optional)

arguments.name: index_uids
arguments.desc: Cancel tasks matching index UIDs (optional)

name: add_webhook
description: Add a new webhook to Meilisearch.

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: The target URL of the webhook

arguments.name: headers
arguments.desc: Optional HTTP headers to send with webhook events (optional)

name: update_webhook
description: Modify a previously existing webhook in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: uuid
arguments.desc: The UUID of the webhook to update

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: The new target URL of the webhook (optional)

arguments.name: headers
arguments.desc: Optional updated HTTP headers to send (optional)

name: delete_webhook
description: Delete an existing webhook in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: uuid
arguments.desc: The UUID of the webhook to delete

name: get_webhook
description: Get a webhook by its UUID in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: uuid
arguments.desc: The UUID of the webhook to retrieve

name: list_webhooks
description: List all webhooks configured in Meilisearch.

name: chat_completion
description: Get a chat completion from a Meilisearch chat workspace.

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.desc: The ID/UID of the chat workspace to use

arguments.name: model
arguments.desc: Model to run the query on

arguments.name: messages
arguments.desc: Chat history messages in standard OpenAI format

name: list_chat_workspaces
description: List all chat workspaces configured in Meilisearch.

arguments.name: offset
arguments.desc: Offset for pagination (default 0, optional)

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum number of workspaces to return (default 20, optional)

name: get_chat_workspace
description: Get a chat workspace configuration by its ID.

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.desc: The ID/UID of the workspace to retrieve

name: get_chat_workspace_settings
description: Get chat workspace settings by workspace ID.

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.desc: The ID/UID of the workspace

name: update_chat_workspace
description: Update a chat workspace by its ID.

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.desc: The ID/UID of the workspace to update

arguments.name: settings
arguments.desc: The updated settings object for the chat workspace

name: reset_chat_workspace
description: Reset a chat workspace configuration by its ID.

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.desc: The ID/UID of the workspace to reset

name: get_health
description: Get health status of the Meilisearch instance.

name: get_version
description: Get the Meilisearch instance version.

name: get_stats
description: Get database stats for all indexes.
